prompts.title: Budget Build Debate: RX 7800 XT vs RTX 4070 for 1440p in 2026?
prompts.body: Assume a fixed total build budget and similar local pricing. Which card gives the better real-world value this year, and why?
prompts.first_comment: Please include use case, power/noise concerns, and upgrade horizon in your argument.
risk_notes: Needs live subreddit rule check for allowed post type.
Use neutral framing to avoid brand-war baiting.
